subcodes.first_line: O my God, my Beloved, my heart's Desire! Bestow upon me from Thine own presence a gift, for verily Thou art the Near One and the Answerering One. And cause the faces [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و محبوبی و منائی هب لی من لدنک موهبه انک انت القریب المجیب و اجعل الوجوه
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @suffering and imprisonment, @spiritual transformation, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
